children.heading: .—Grant Authority
children.label: a .—Grant Authority
children.text: The Secretary shall make a grant to an appropriate entity for promoting public education and awareness with respect to the 811 national excavation damage prevention phone number.

children.heading: .—Authorization of Appropriations
children.label: b .—Authorization of Appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary $1,000,000 for the period beginning , and ending , to carry out this section.October 1, 2006September 30, 2008
